data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Commission rules by product/service/category', but there is no evidence provided that directly addresses this requirement. The prior steps focus on various aspects of the booking and financial processes but do not include any checks or validations related to commission rules. This indicates a clear gap in the coverage of the requirement, as no evidence was recorded to confirm or deny its satisfaction.
gaps: No evidence of validation for commission rules by product/service/category.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add validation for commission rules
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete checks that verify commission rules by product/service/category.
